meta.title: Attacks From The 4G/5G Core
meta.description:
Charles Perine (a Digital Bond alum now with Trend Micro) looks at how an attacker could interfere with a 4G or 5G campus networks used for ICS and/or IIoT. This includes the APNs that the carriers have been heavily promoting for cost savings use in industrial networks and 5G where an asset owner is responsible for everything.

Charles goes over the lab they set up, the attack scenarios, and what worked and didn't work.
